query:
SELECT id, name, username, phone, isActive 
FROM users 
WHERE role = 'delivery' 
ORDER BY id 
LIMIT 10
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3Kz4ErUoqpGjgNg.dff2f62e1b6f --database nuXmcfyGeo7bacZX3ZUfKS --execute SELECT id, name, username, phone, isActive 
FROM users 
WHERE role = 'delivery' 
ORDER BY id 
LIMIT 10
